steps.title: Keep actor and role distinct
steps.content: The sentence says the best discussions maintain a rigid distinction between an actor and a character. The blank must therefore mean treating two separate things as if they were the same.

steps.title: Choose the merging verb
steps.content: B means serve as a perfect example, C means criticize harshly, and D means make something seem less important. "Conflate" means combine or confuse separate things, which fits the warning about actor and character. The answer is A.
